title: Exedium CE+
description: The modpack for the creators of their modpacks contains optimization mods that are included in every modpack
body:
# ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eff4a48673637583c756a0299e0ecb6e5d6c6b4.png)

Do you want to create your own modpack, but don’t know which mods should be included in the modpack? then install this modpack and create your own; libraries for mods and optimization mods are installed in it

### This modpack contains:

- Architectury API
- Bookshelf
- Cloth Config API
- Configured Defaults
- CIT Resewn
- Default Dark Mode
- Dynamic FPS
- EMF Entity Model Features
- Entity Culling
- Entity Texture Features
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Fast Better Grass
- FerriteCore
- Forge Config API Port
- Geckolib
- Iris Shaders
- Indium
- LazyDFU
- Lithium
- libIPN
- MidnightLib
- Mod Menu
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra

## Recommendations for creating your own modpack

Marking this modpack as the basis for your modpack does not require just changing the name and avatar after installing exedium, I do not forbid you to use this modpack for another purpose
